description: Style NoteWith a fruity, vibrant fragrance of California orange, blackcurrant, dewberry and subtle rose oil, the burberry Touch exudes fresh top notes of sensuous jasmine, Madonna lily and tuberose with a delicate hint of peach and raspberry while cedar wood, oak moss and vanilla complement the fruity notes, adding warmthand depth. Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
